name: Dilled Tuna Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion and celery; sauté for about 5 minutes.
2. Stir in flour, dillweed, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1-2 minutes until smooth.
3. Gradually stir in milk, cooking for 1-2 minutes until the mixture thickens.
4. Flake tuna and mix with peas. Bring to a boil, stirring often.
5. Spoon sauce into a 6-cup casserole dish. Arrange biscuits on top of the sauce.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes or until biscuits are golden brown.
